template_data.quote_html: By the time the RFP posts, someone already has the edge.
template_data.image_headline: THE RFP IS ALREADY TOO LATE
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic split layout. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'TOO LATE' with red X icon, three short labels: 'RFP Drops', 'Crowd Competes', 'Edge Lost'. Right panel cream/white, bold label 'RIGHT WINDOW' with green check icon, three short labels: 'Sources Sought', 'Industry Day', 'Capability Brief'. Center: illustrated professional in blazer stepping through a door marked 'PRE-AWARD'. Bold headline top: 'THE RFP IS ALREADY TOO LATE'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
